title: Japanese Ochazuke with Roasted Fennel
description: A Japanese comfort food dish made with steaming hot rice, gently poached fish, and crunchy roasted fennel.

ingredients.name: Salmon fillet
ingredients.notes: cooked to an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C)

instructions: 2. Cut the fennel bulb in half and slice it thinly. Place on a baking sheet and drizzle with olive oil. Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and caramelized.
3. Cook the Japanese rice according to the package instructions.
4. Season the salmon fillet with salt and pepper. Cook in a pan with a little bit of sesame oil until cooked through, about 4-6 minutes per side.
5. To assemble the dish, place a scoop of cooked rice in a bowl. Place the cooked salmon fillet on top of the rice.
6. Spoon the roasted fennel over the salmon. Drizzle with soy sauce, sake, and sesame oil.
7. Sprinkle furikake over the top of the dish and garnish with chopped green onions.
